/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libIdentityPlugin.so -o ../libIdentityPlugin.so CMakeFiles/IdentityPlugin.dir/IdentityPlugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IdentityPlugin.dir/IdentityPlugin.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
